title: Disability Rights in Employment — Massachusetts Office on Disability (mass.gov capture)
description: Capture of the Massachusetts Office on Disability (MOD) reference page on disability rights in the workplace. Covers the governing federal and state laws (ADA Title I, Rehabilitation Act, FMLA; M.G.L. c. 151B, Executive Order 592), the legal definition of disability, disability discrimination and harassment, the reasonable-accommodation interactive process and undue-hardship standard, a step-by-step employee guide to requesting an accommodation, and internal/external recourse options (MCAD, EEOC). Prose page converted to Markdown.
notes: Page capture includes mass.gov chrome (state seal, feedback widgets, translate notice) that is not substantive content. MOD provides individualized guidance and technical assistance but is not itself an enforcement agency.
